submission.title: Seeded demo: Routing rescue for constrained logistics
submission.solution_summary: This seeded demo submission frames routing overhead as the governing failure mode, shrinks the QUBO graph before quantum execution, and keeps a classical baseline in the loop so the claimed rescue remains auditable instead of aspirational.
submission.implementation_notes: The plan records SWAP depth, routed circuit depth, and solution quality against a classical control path. It compresses the graph before placement, names rollback conditions, and keeps the validation story explicit enough for partner review.
submission.ai_feedback_summary: The seeded demo is structurally strong. Keep routing depth, graph shrinking, and baseline metrics visible so first-pass evaluation stays honest.
ai_recommendations: Keep the classical baseline and fallback path visible in the submission body.
Call out routing depth and SWAP overhead as first-order constraints instead of secondary implementation details.
Tie validation to measurable thresholds so the rescue path can be audited later.

review.feedback: Seeded demo review: strong systems grounding and baseline awareness. The proposal makes routing cost, graph reduction, and validation criteria inspectable enough for immediate external evaluation.
